summary: Completed testing of prediction behavior changes on match detail page. Core functionality implemented correctly - 'Guess It' and 'Remove' buttons removed, single-click voting works. Found several UI/UX issues that need attention.

ui_bugs.issue: Exact Score section not accessible/visible on match detail page
Prediction status element not found after voting
Vote buttons on main page not visible/clickable
Success toast notifications not clearly visible after voting

integration_issues.issue: User session appears to be lost when navigating between pages
affected_selectors: Sign in prompt appears on detail page

passed_tests: 'Guess It' button successfully removed from detail page
'Remove' button successfully removed from detail page
Vote buttons (1/X/2) are clickable on match detail page
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Exact Score section visibility on match detail page. Ensure prediction status element shows after voting. Improve toast notification visibility. Fix main page vote button interaction issues. Address user session management between page navigation.
